questionHtml: Show that the energy released in this decay is about 6 MeV.
markschemeHtml:
correct mass numbers for uranium (234) and alpha (4) ✓

234×7.600+4×7.074-238×7.568 «MeV» ✓

energy released 5.51 «MeV» ✓

 

Ignore any negative sign.
